end_criteria: CS-250 is done or written product risk acceptance limits non-public experiments.
Transit graph manifest is validated before any executable temporal runtime.
No public API, OpenAPI schema, frontend route, DB model or migration is added.
product_rationale: Les transits reutilisent le socle natal, limitent le premier scope temporel a une lecture datee, et gardent les familles multi-chart ou doctrinales fermees.

rejected_candidates.reason: Requires multi-chart relationship ownership before first temporal path.
Requires return-specific date/location policy after transit proof.
Requires return cadence and location policy after transit proof.
Requires progression method governance before implementation.
Requires relationship and composition-method ownership first.
Requires doctrine school governance before temporal implementation.
Requires product forecasting primitive and technique bundle decision.

moving objects computed for the target date
non-public diagnostics only until product projection is accepted

required_graph_contracts: CS-247 graph manifest and node IO schema

required_inputs.policy: single target date first; bounded range only after trace review
explicit timezone required for transit target
explicit transit location or documented natal-location reuse
SwissEph proof must remain closed before public rollout

declare aspect relationship contract before calculation
